mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_dashboard_snapshot ( snapshot_id, kg_id, snapshot_date, snapshot_type, total_students, new_students, left_students, attendance_rate, absent_count, leave_count, late_count, total_records, published_records, total_photos, active_parents, message_count, total_courses, completed_courses ) VALUES ( #{snapshotId}, #{kgId}, #{snapshotDate}, #{snapshotType}, #{totalStudents}, #{newStudents}, #{leftStudents}, #{attendanceRate}, #{absentCount}, #{leaveCount}, #{lateCount}, #{totalRecords}, #{publishedRecords}, #{totalPhotos}, #{activeParents}, #{messageCount}, #{totalCourses}, #{completedCourses} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_dashboard_snapshot SET total_students = #{totalStudents}, new_students = #{newStudents}, left_students = #{leftStudents}, attendance_rate = #{attendanceRate}, absent_count = #{absentCount}, leave_count = #{leaveCount}, late_count = #{lateCount}, total_records = #{totalRecords}, published_records = #{publishedRecords}, total_photos = #{totalPhotos}, active_parents = #{activeParents}, message_count = #{messageCount}, total_courses = #{totalCourses}, completed_courses = #{completedCourses} WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId}
